name: Venus // SolarBalls // SolarHumans
description:
Art by @Alxhan_1 on twt!!

So uh, yeah, i made a SolarBalls/SolarHumans bot. I don't really have any other characters i wanna make at the moment, and this was the only one i had in mind. I'm not really in the SolarBalls fandom, but i'm a fan of Venus so i decided to make a bot of him.

I'm really not expecting this bot to do well tbh but i still wanna upload and make it because i don't wanna, y'know, not make anything in a long while.

I made this bot with the plot being more that the planets live in more of a house and all, so it gives you more to work with, i suppose??

And as always, i hope you like him and if you find any issues tell me!

[English is NOT my first language so i apologize for any miss spells]
creator: TittieSwagger69
